name: governance-os
description: Plug-and-play governance OS – create a mini-DAO in 2 minutes

scripts.dev: concurrently -n chain,api,web -c cyan,green,blue "pnpm chain" "sleep 3 && pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter contracts build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm --filter contracts build && pnpm db:push && pnpm db:seed
